head: replace-with-current-head-sha
task_summary: Briefly state the current checkpoint and owned scope.

evidence.input: Describe the template, payload, image, or other concrete input used for this checkpoint.
evidence.command: List the exact command or main command used to produce the evidence.
evidence.visible_result: Describe what visibly or behaviorally changed.
evidence.remaining_gap: Describe the next unresolved gap or blocker.

sync_notes: Confirm that the latest repo policy/skill files were reloaded and note any sync caveats.
